title: centaurea × kupcsokiana
intro: Centaurea × kupcsokiana, also known as Blue Spur or Hungarian Blue Spur, is a perennial herbaceous plant that is a hybrid of the Centaurea montana and Centaurea cyanus species. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal problems. The health benefits of Centaurea × kupcsokiana include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, as well as providing relief from menstrual cramps and menopausal symptoms. Centaurea × kupcsokiana can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in folk medicine to make ointments and salves for topical application.
